violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Edges for the counter for the hand sink are bare wood.

Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room used by women did not contain at least one covered waste receptacle. Women’s restroom waste receptacle did not have a lid--Toilet room was not provided with a tight fitting or self closing door. Men’s restroom door by the three compartment sink was not self closing.
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
